title: Crystals
description: A Minecraft Mod witch adds crystals...
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Killarexe/Crystals/master/common/src/main/resources/assets/crystals/title.png)

# About

Crystals is a small mod avaliable for **Forge and Fabric** which adds new crystals witch generates on top of ores like: Redstone, Lapis, Emerald and Diamond.

Each crystal drops the corresponding mineral (e.g. diamond crystals drops diamonds).
